title: Cervical Cancer Screening Coverage Gaps In Low- And Middle-Income Countries
summary: Build a verified workflow for measuring cervical cancer screening coverage and HPV vaccination gaps in LMICs, linking DHS cervical screening data and HPV vaccine-coverage data.
why_it_matters: Build a verified workflow for measuring cervical cancer screening coverage and HPV vaccination gaps in LMICs, linking DHS cervical screening data and HPV vaccine-coverage data.

success_metrics.target: Every claim links dated evidence with methodology.

review_policy.merge_gate: Schema validation, domain review, safety review, replication.
